LanguageData.Fleshbeasts.label: FEV beast
LanguageData.Fleshbeasts.description: Creatures produced by runaway Forced Evolutionary Virus exposure in Big MT containment vats. FEV beasts are masses of cancerous, rapidly dividing flesh organized by a distributed nervous system. Some specimens contain multiple redundant neural cores, allowing them to split into smaller beasts on death. They are directed at a high level by a ZAX unit.
LanguageData.FleshmassNucleus.label: ZAX unit
LanguageData.Dreadmeld.label: FEV amalgam
